title: Federal Order Puts AI's Power Bill on the Grid - TCR 07/04/26
description:
A federal emergency order signed June 30 put data centers on backup power as northern Virginia wholesale power ran past $1,000/MWh during the early July heat wave, Google's electricity use jumped 37% in a single year while Amazon's emissions rose 16% to 81 million tons, and two teams cracked glioblastoma's defenses in one week with a dual-target CAR-T and a neoantigen vaccine holding 100% one-year survival.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-july-4-2026/

0:00 Federal grid emergency puts data centers on backup power
0:42 The AI token trade cools as Tesla caps its own spend
4:18 The Pentagon-Anthropic breakup in their own emails
7:42 Two independent shots at glioblastoma
11:46 The Pentagon–Anthropic Breakup, in Their Own Emails
15:10 Synthesis and Closing

This episode covers the DOE Section 202(c) grid emergency and PJM's backstop auction, Google's 37% electricity jump and Amazon's 16% emissions rise, the token-trade cooldown as Tesla caps AI spend at $200 a week, the dual glioblastoma breakthroughs, and the released emails behind the Anthropic-Pentagon split.

For two years the AI buildout was narrated as an abstraction of capex figures and capability curves. Over the last few days it slammed into physical and financial limits. A federal emergency order directed PJM to run every fossil plant flat out and authorized curtailing data centers on backup power as northern Virginia spot prices ran roughly twentyfivefold above normal. Underneath it, a backstop auction advanced that ties the cost of new power to the loads that create it. The hyperscalers named the weight: Google's electricity use rose 37% while its operational emissions fell 2% through clean procurement, and Amazon conceded its 2040 net-zero target may slip. The token trade cooled as the cleanest read on AI spending fell nearly 20% and Tesla capped employee budgets at $200 a week, pushing enterprises toward open-weight efficiency. And two independent teams pried open glioblastoma - a GPNMB CAR-T clearing the tumor and its protective macrophages, and a personalized dendritic-cell vaccine reporting 16.2-month median PFS and 100% twelve-month survival.
